testcase.name: crossbrowser_test

error.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: Could not create a session: The Safari instance is already paired with a different session. Host info: host: 'Pankajs-MacBook-Air-2.local', ip: '2401:4900:88d3:fafc:2540:aba7:9fc0:74c7%en0' Build info: version: '4.44.0', revision: 'da2039b' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '15.7.3', java.version: '21.0.10' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.safari.SafariDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: safari}]}] Capabilities {browserName: safari}

testcase.error: org.openqa.selenium.SessionNotCreatedException: Could not start a new session. Response code 500.
